mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_exam_record (student_id, paper_id, total_score, start_time, submit_time, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{paperId}, #{totalScore}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT er.*, p.paper_name, c.course_name FROM t_exam_record er LEFT JOIN t_paper p ON er.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN t_course c ON p.course_id = c.course_id WHERE er.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY er.start_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT er.*, p.paper_name, c.course_name, p.duration AS paper_duration, p.total_score AS paper_total_score, s.real_name AS student_name, s.class_name FROM t_exam_record er LEFT JOIN t_paper p ON er.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN t_course c ON p.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN t_student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id WHERE er.exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_exam_record SET total_score = #{totalScore} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}
UPDATE t_exam_record SET status = #{status}, submit_time = #{submitTime} WHERE exam_record_id = #{examRecordId}
mapper.select: SELECT er.total_score, p.paper_name, p.total_score AS paper_total_score, er.submit_time FROM t_exam_record er LEFT JOIN t_paper p ON er.paper_id = p.paper_id WHERE er.student_id = #{studentId} AND er.status = 1 ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC

SELECT s.student_id, s.real_name, s.class_name, er.total_score, er.submit_time FROM t_exam_record er LEFT JOIN t_student s ON er.student_id = s.student_id WHERE er.paper_id = #{paperId} AND er.status = 1 ORDER BY er.total_score DESC
